sourcesContent:
import React from 'react'; import Layout from '../components/Layout'; import { ArrowLeft, X, ShoppingCart as CartIcon } from 'lucide-react'; import { Link } from 'react-router-dom'; const CartPage: React.FC = () => { const cartItems = [ { id: 1, title: "Complex Criminal Trial Simulation", creator: "Prof. Rajesh Kumar", points: 2990, price: 299, difficulty: "Expert", image: "" }, { id: 2, title: "Corporate Merger Negotiation", creator: "LegalEdge Studios", points: 1990, price: 199, difficulty: "Advanced", image: "" }, { id: 3, title: "Family Mediation Mastery", creator: "Divorce Law Experts", points: 1490, price: 149, difficulty: "Intermediate", image: "" } ]; const subtotal = cartItems.reduce((sum, item) => sum + item.price, 0); const discount = 65; const tax = 116; const total = subtotal - discount + tax; const removeItem = (id: number) => { console.log(`Removing item ${id}`); // In a real app, this would update the cart state }; return (
Back to Marketplace
{/* Cart Items */}

Your Cart ({cartItems.length})

{cartItems.length === 0 ? (

Your cart is empty

Add some scenarios to your cart to get started

) : (
{cartItems.map((item) => (

{item.title}

{item.creator} • {item.difficulty}

{item.points} points • ₹{item.price}
))}
)}
{/* Order Summary */}

Order Summary

Subtotal ₹{subtotal}
Discount -₹{discount}
Tax ₹{tax}
Total ₹{total}
Continue Shopping

Points Reward

You'll receive {cartItems.reduce((sum, item) => sum + item.points, 0)} points after purchase

75% of the way to your next reward tier

); }; export default CartPage;
